standards.name: Alberta Transportation Highway Geometric Design Guide
standards.description: Multi-chapter geometric design guide for Alberta highways. Updated via Design Bulletins. February 2022 most recent revision.

standards.name: ALSA Manual of Standard Practice
standards.description: Covers code of ethics, measurements/accuracies, GNSS surveys, boundaries, field notes, plan requirements for Alberta Land Surveyors.

standards.name: APEGA Practice Standards and Guidelines
standards.description: Regulates engineering and geoscience in Alberta. Practice standards set minimum requirements. PPMP required for all permit holders.

standards.name: GeoDiscover Alberta
standards.description: Alberta's geospatial data search portal with interactive Map Viewer.

standards.name: AltaLIS / Alberta Data Partnerships
standards.costAccess: Varies (base data now free, premium products paid)
standards.description: Distributes property, base features, terrain (LiDAR DEMs), and imagery on behalf of Government of Alberta. Established 1998. Base data now open and free.

standards.name: Alberta Land Surveyors Act
standards.description: Provincial legislation governing the practice of land surveying in Alberta.

standards.name: Alberta Safety Codes / National Building Code - 2023 Alberta Edition
standards.organization: Safety Codes Council / Government of Alberta
standards.description: Alberta's safety codes system. NBC 2023 Alberta Edition in force May 2024. Standata bulletins at alberta.ca/building-standata.

standards.name: Alberta Geological Survey
standards.description: Geological mapping, subsurface data, mineral resources, and geotechnical information for Alberta.

standards.name: Alberta Environment Stormwater Management Guidelines
standards.description: Standards and Guidelines for Municipal Waterworks, Wastewater and Storm Drainage Systems. Part 5: Stormwater Management Guidelines.

standards.name: ASET Technology Professionals Standards
standards.description: Professional standards for certified engineering technologists and technicians in Alberta.

standards.name: Alberta Municipal Affairs Municipal Planning Resources
standards.description: Provincial planning resources including MDP guidebook, subdivision guides, and municipal government resources.
